title: Hybrid Blocks
description: A mod that adds a variety of decorative and colorful blocks to the game
body:
**Hybrid Blocks** is a mod focusing on adding new decorative and colorful blocks to help you give your builds just that little bit of extra detailing it needs.

The mod offers a large collection of blocks expanding on the vanilla set, including:
- Stained bricks for each of the 16 base colors in the game, as well as both nether bricks, and mud bricks. This also includes a variety of new brick patterns
- Shingles, in all 16 colors, for your roofing needs
- Chimney blocks matching each brick variant
- Stained quartz for each of the 16 base colors, plus new Quartz Tiles, perfect for your kitchen build
- Polished Calcite
- Borderless clear glass perfect for building an aquarium with a better view of [all your pretty fish](https://modrinth.com/mod/hybrid-aquatic) (wink wink)
